'''Strike force Alpha''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Brigade/Legends|brigade]] during the [[Krantian Civil War]]<ref name="SW:GB" /> between [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]] and [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]<ref name="The New Essential Chronology" /> The force, largely composed of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], attacked the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Ghost Base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Krant]] after finding out that a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] by the name of [[Utric Sandov]] was to meet with a group of Rebel operatives there. A [[Unidentified Rebel officer (Ghost Base)|Rebel officer]] attempted to delay Strike force Alpha, but the unit took control of the base and constructed its own military camp within the remains of Ghost Base using [[ASP-7 labor droid/Legends|ASP-7 labor droids]]. However, Utric Sandov had evacuated himself and the base staff to a nearby island called [[Le'Roche]]. Strike force Alpha's base was subsequently destroyed by a Rebel [[Army/Legends|army]] led by the exiled [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Echuu Shen-Jon]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], rendering the Imperial strike force extant. They had their wills twisted by [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark powers]], driving them to [[Death/Legends|suicide]] if a Jedi tried to [[Mind trick/Legends|convert]] them.<ref name="SW:GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Strike force Alpha was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|strategy guide]] for the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''. The force received its name in the game itself during the second Princess Leia campaign mission. The campaign also appeared in the game's [[2002]] expansion pack, [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|''Clone Campaigns'']].
